since_last: 82% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.86%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 82% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC +1.06% · Gold -1.10% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 82% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.86%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.86%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -50.95%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +21.60%, KLAC +11.73%, AMAT +11.63%, BIDU +9.30%, PANW +9.07%. Laggards: HON -50.95%, SMCI -6.69%, DLR -3.17%, SYNA -2.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.72% at $163.53
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.72% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
